summary: Implementation contract reviewed and approved. All design guide decisions (separate schema-template.ts, recursive ref resolution with depth guard, required-only fields, conditional schema merge) are faithfully represented. Edge cases are adequate. One minor discrepancy: task contract says 16 schemas but SCHEMAS registry has 15 entries (_defs is separate). Not blocking.
concerns: Task contract acceptance criterion says 16 schemas but SCHEMAS has 15 entries; _defs is exported separately. Worker should clarify count with orchestrator.
